period) and coverage criteria (FFS Part A and Part B coverage during the entire specified time period). 

For Alzheimer's disease, beneficiaries must have at least one inpatient, SNF, home health, Part B 
institutional, or Part B non-institutional (carrier) claim with an Alzheimer's code in any position during 
the three-year reference period.
